items.title: Japan goalkeeper Okuma signs for Aston Villa
items.summary: Aston Villa announce the signing of 21-year-old Japan goalkeeper Akane Okuma.

items.title: How celebs including David Beckham & Shakira made millions from the World Cup… and even Susan Boyle got a massive payday
items.summary: SPAIN may have won the World Cup title, but Sir David Beckham is the real winner, appearing in every ad break and taking home £19 MILLION from appearances. The former England captain, 51, plugged everything from the Bank of America to Lay’s crisps in the many extra ad breaks during this tournament.

items.title: Charges and challenges - the scale of the task facing Maresca at Man City
items.summary: Plenty of the Premier League's top clubs have rolled the managerial dice ahead of next season. Manchester City are one of those starting a new era, turning to Enzo Maresca in the wake of Pep Guardiola's decision to depart.

items.title: Everton agree deal to sign Leicester’s Rantala
items.summary: Everton agree a deal to sign Finland international Jutta Rantala from Leicester City.

items.summary: France defender is club’s sixth signing of the summer Coach Ho says she is aggressive and good on the ball Tottenham have signed the France defender Alice Sombath from Lyonnes for a club record fee. items.summary: ALTAY BAYINDIR has been granted additional time off by Manchester United ahead of his expected departure. items.title: England midfielder, 22, rejects new contract offer amid Man Utd, Arsenal and Chelsea transfer interest
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED target Alex Scott has rejected a new contract at Bournemouth. Scott, 22, has entered the final two years of his existing deal but is keen to leave this summer. items.title: 'Fight of the year!' | Lamine Yamal holds Paredes sign during bus parade!
items.summary: Lamine Yamal showed off a Paredes vs Gavi sign at Spain's open-top bus parade celebrating their World Cup win, referencing the scuffle between the two midfielders after the full-time whistle on Sunday.

items.title: Why England teenager Parkinson has a mindset coach
items.summary: Why England teenager Erica Meg Parkinson has a mindset coach who has worked with the All Blacks and ex-England cricketer Ashley Giles.

items.summary: LIONEL MESSI was missing from Argentina's flight home after their World Cup final defeat to Spain.
